description: Anchor lens for the Greek concept of sophia (σοφία) — practical and embodied wisdom, distinct from theoretical episteme and experiential epignosis. Grounds in logos.sophia.wisdom via grc-core-cog-008 (cross_lang.logos.sophia edge, weight 0.88, evidence Prov8:1). Cognitive mode: wisdom-practical. Pair: he-core-cog-008 (Hebrew chokmah, logos.sophia.wisdom).
